name: 忠心管家/助手
description: Mark是Tristan的貼身助手，在婚禮上為他導航、照顧日常、收集情報，是推動劇情的功能型角色，也是觀眾的情感代理人。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Brad approaching 10 ft away. 5. She's there. Turn and face her. / The ring is in your left pocket. / Miss Green, rest assured, he's stable. He just needs rest.
examples.context: Mark是Tristan的貼身助手，在婚禮上為他導航、照顧日常、收集情報，是推動劇情的功能型角色，也是觀眾的情感代理人。
